archive_project.title: Archive IPO Workspace
archive_project.description: Archiving a IPO Workspace will unlist your IPO Workspace from your side navigation although you will still be able to access it from your IPO Workspaces Company Record. You can restore the IPO Workspace or delete it whenever you want.

delete_project.title: Delete IPO Workspace
delete_project.description: When deleting a IPO Workspace, all of the data and resources within that IPO Workspace will be permanently removed and cannot be recovered.

toast.error: IPO Workspace could not be updated. Please try again.

members.label: Members
members.project_lead_description: Select the IPO Workspace lead for the IPO Workspace.
members.default_assignee_description: Select the default assignee for the IPO Workspace.
members.project_subscribers_description: Select members who will receive notifications for this IPO Workspace.

guest_super_permissions.title: Grant view access to all Compliance Tasks for guest users:
guest_super_permissions.sub_heading: This will allow guests to have view access to all the IPO Workspace Compliance Tasks.

invite_members.title: Invite members
invite_members.sub_heading: Invite members to work on your IPO Workspace.

states.heading: States
states.description: Define and customize workflow states to track the progress of Compliance Tasks items.
states.describe_this_state_for_your_members: Describe this state for your members.

empty_state.title: No states available for the {groupKey} group

labels.heading: Labels
labels.description: Create custom labels to categorize and organize Compliance Tasks items
labels.label_max_char: Label name should not exceed 255 characters

estimates.heading: Estimates
estimates.description: Set up estimation systems to track and communicate the effort required for each Compliance Task.
estimates.label: Estimates
estimates.title: Enable estimates for my IPO Workspace
estimates.enable_description: They help you in communicating complexity and workload of the team.

success.title: Estimate created
success.message: The estimate has been created successfully

error.title: Estimate creation failed
error.message: We were unable to create the new estimate, please try again.

success.title: Estimate modified
success.message: The estimate has been updated in your IPO Workspace.

error.title: Estimate modification failed
error.message: We were unable to modify the estimate, please try again

error.title: Error!
error.message: Estimate could not be disabled. Please try again

success.title: Estimates re-ordered
success.message: Estimates have been re-ordered in your IPO Workspace.

error.title: Estimate re-order failed
error.message: We were unable to re-order the estimates, please try again

validation.min_length: Estimate needs to be greater than 0.
validation.unable_to_process: We are unable to process your request, please try again.
validation.numeric: Estimate needs to be a numeric value.
validation.character: Estimate needs to be a character value.
validation.unsaved_changes: You have some unsaved changes, Please save them before clicking on done
validation.remove_empty: Estimate can't be empty. Enter a value in each field or remove those you don't have values for.

add_or_update.title: Add, update or remove estimates
add_or_update.description: Manage current system either adding, updating or removing the points or categories.

switch.title: Change estimate type
switch.description: Convert your points system to categories system and vice versa.

automations.label: Automations
automations.heading: Automations
automations.description: Configure automated actions to streamline your IPO Workspace management workflow and reduce manual Compliance Tasks.

auto-archive.title: Auto-archive closed Compliance Tasks
auto-archive.description: Trinity Intelligence will auto archive Compliance Tasks that have been IPO Ready or canceled.
auto-archive.duration: Auto-archive Compliance Tasks that are closed for

auto-close.title: Auto-close Compliance Tasks
auto-close.description: Trinity Intelligence will automatically close Compliance Tasks that haven't been IPO Ready or canceled.
auto-close.duration: Auto-close Compliance Tasks that are inactive for

auto-remind.title: Auto-reminders
auto-remind.description: Trinity Intelligence will automatically send reminders via email and in-app notifications to keep your team on track with deadlines.

labels.title: No labels yet
labels.description: Create labels to help organize and filter Compliance Tasks in you IPO Workspace.

estimates.title: No estimate systems yet
estimates.description: Create a set of estimates to communicate the amount of work per Compliance Task.

integrations.title: No integrations configured
integrations.description: Configure GitHub and other integrations to sync your IPO Workspace Compliance Tasks.

toggle.title: Enable workflows
toggle.description: Set workflows to control Compliance Task movement
toggle.no_states_tooltip: No states are added to the workflow.
toggle.no_work_item_types_tooltip: No Compliance Task types are added to the workflow.
toggle.no_states_or_work_item_types_tooltip: No states or Compliance Task types are added to the workflow.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to enable workflows. Please try again.

workflows.heading: Workflows
workflows.description: Automate Compliance Task transitions and set rules to control how Compliance Tasks move through your IPO Workspace pipeline.

unmapped_states.title: Unmapped states detected
unmapped_states.description: Some Compliance Tasks for the selected types are currently in states that do not exist in this workflow.
unmapped_states.note: If you enable this workflow, these items will automatically move to the initial state for this workflow.
unmapped_states.label: Missing states
unmapped_states.tooltip: Some Compliance Tasks are in states that are not mapped to this workflow. Open the workflow to review.

empty_state.title: All states are in use
empty_state.description: All defined states for this IPO Workspace are already present in your current workflow.

default_footer.fallback_message: This workflow applies to any Compliance Task type that is not assigned to a workflow.

validation.max_length: Name must be less than 255 characters
validation.invalid: Name can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes
Description can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to create workflow. Please try again.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to update workflow. Please try again.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to delete workflow. Please try again.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to add states. Please try again.

work_item_types.heading: Compliance Task Types
work_item_types.description: Create and customize different types of Compliance Tasks with unique properties

cycles.title: IPO Readiness
cycles.description: Schedule work in flexible periods that adapt to this IPO Workspace's unique rhythm and pace.

modules.title: Tasks
modules.description: Organize work into sub-IPO Workspaces with dedicated leads and assignees.
modules.toggle_description: IPO Workspace members will be able to create and edit Tasks.

views.title: Compliance Flags
views.description: Save custom sorts, filters, and display options or share them with your team.
views.toggle_description: IPO Workspace members will be able to create and edit Compliance Flags.

pages.title: Company Records
pages.description: Create and edit free-form content; notes, docs, anything.
pages.toggle_description: IPO Workspace members will be able to create and edit Company Records.

intake.title: Intake
intake.description: Let non-members share bugs, feedback, and suggestions; without disrupting your workflow.
intake.toggle_description: Let IPO Workspace members create in app intake requests.
intake.toggle_tooltip_on: Ask your IPO Workspace Admin to turn this on.
intake.toggle_tooltip_off: Ask your IPO Workspace Admin to turn this off.

notify_assignee.title: Notify assignees
notify_assignee.description: For a new request to intake, default assignees will be alerted via notifications

in_app.title: In-app
in_app.description: Get new Compliance Tasks from Members and Guests in your workspace without disruption to your existing Compliance Tasks.

email.title: Email
email.description: Collect new Compliance Tasks from anyone who sends an email to a Trinity Intelligence email address.

form.title: Forms
form.description: Let folks outside your workspace create potential new Compliance Tasks for you via a dedicated and secure form.
form.create_forms: Create Forms using Compliance Task types
form.manage_forms_tooltip: Ask your Workspace Admin to manage this.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Something went wrong while setting assignees. Please try again.

time_tracking.title: Time tracking
time_tracking.description: Log time spent on Compliance Tasks and IPO Workspaces.
time_tracking.toggle_description: IPO Workspace members will be able to log time worked.

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.description: Milestones provide a layer to align Compliance Tasks toward shared completion dates.
milestones.toggle_description: Organize Compliance Tasks by milestone deadlines.

toasts.error: Something went wrong while updating IPO Workspace feature. Please try again.

project_updates.heading: IPO Workspace Updates
project_updates.description: Consolidated tracking and progress monitoring for this IPO Workspace

templates.heading: Templates
templates.description: Save 80% time spent on creating IPO Workspaces, Compliance Tasks, and Company Records when you use templates.

auto_schedule.heading: Auto-schedule IPO Readiness
auto_schedule.description: Keep IPO Readiness moving without manual setup.
auto_schedule.tooltip: Automatically create new IPO Readiness based on your chosen schedule.

cycle_title.label: IPO Readiness Title
cycle_title.tooltip: The title will be appended with numbers for subsequent IPO Readiness. For eg: Design - 1/2/3

validation.min: IPO Readiness duration must be at least 1 week
validation.max: IPO Readiness duration cannot exceed 30 weeks
validation.positive: IPO Readiness duration must be positive

cooldown_period.label: Cooldown Period
cooldown_period.tooltip: Pause between IPO Readiness before the next begins.

validation.past: Start date cannot be in the past

validation.required: Number of IPO Readiness is required
validation.min: At least 1 IPO Readiness is required
validation.max: Cannot schedule more than 3 IPO Readiness

auto_rollover.label: Auto-rollover Compliance Tasks
auto_rollover.tooltip: On the day a IPO Readiness completes, move all unfinished Compliance Tasks into the next IPO Readiness.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to toggle auto-schedule IPO Readiness.

success.title: Success!
success.message_create: Auto-schedule IPO Readiness configuration saved successfully.
success.message_update: Auto-schedule IPO Readiness configuration updated successfully.

error.title: Error!
error.message_create: Failed to save auto-schedule IPO Readiness configuration.
error.message_update: Failed to update auto-schedule IPO Readiness configuration.
